tagline: Every referral code I use, in one place — sign up through one and we both get the perk.
why: My referral codes were scattered across emails, apps, and screenshots. I wanted a single tidy page to point people at — pick a service, grab the code, and we both get the bonus.
how: Next.js on Vercel with Notion as the CMS: each code is a row in a Notion database, served through the Notion API. Add a referral in Notion and it appears on the site — no redeploy.

features.title: Every code in one place
features.description: All my referral links for the services I actually use, grouped and ready to copy.

features.title: Notion-backed
features.description: Each code is a row in a Notion database, served via the Notion API — add one in Notion and it shows up on the site without a redeploy.

features.title: Both sides win
features.description: Sign up through a code and we both get the referral perk.
